# Risk Register Template

Use this table to track project risks throughout the lifecycle. Update at least weekly or after any significant change.

## Column Descriptions

| Column | Description |
|---|---|
| **ID** | Unique risk identifier (e.g., R-001) |
| **Description** | Brief description of the risk |
| **Impact** | Potential impact if risk occurs: High / Medium / Low |
| **Likelihood** | Probability of occurrence: High / Medium / Low |
| **Owner** | Person responsible for monitoring and mitigating this risk |
| **Mitigation** | Action(s) taken or planned to reduce likelihood or impact |
| **Status** | Open / Mitigated / Closed / Escalated |

## Risk Register

| ID | Description | Impact | Likelihood | Owner | Mitigation | Status |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| R-001 | Third-party API deprecation could break key integration | High | Medium | @eng-lead | Pin API version; add monitoring alert; plan migration by Q3 | Open |

## Severity Matrix

|  | **Low Likelihood** | **Medium Likelihood** | **High Likelihood** |
|---|---|---|---|
| **High Impact** | Medium | High | Critical |
| **Medium Impact** | Low | Medium | High |
| **Low Impact** | Low | Low | Medium |

*Escalate Critical and High risks to the project sponsor immediately.*
